#466 Bolt fix: per-site eslint-disable-next-line react-hooks/purity is acceptable; do NOT introduce a file-level or project-level disable of react-hooks/purity.

#467 Bolt fix: per-site eslint-disable-next-line react-hooks/set-state-in-effect is acceptable; do NOT introduce a file-level or project-level disable — each site must carry its own single-line justification comment.

#469 Bolt fix: argsIgnorePattern/varsIgnorePattern for ^_ prefix is a RULE CONFIGURATION extension (documented TS-ESLint convention), NOT a rule disable. Scope must be strict: only affects @typescript-eslint/no-unused-vars, only adds the two pattern options, only ^_ prefix. Do NOT blanket-disable the rule. Do NOT add per-file overrides.

Lint 0w/0e MILESTONE (C4829 first clean state, preserved through C4831/4832/4837): every Bolt commit going forward MUST verify `npm run lint` returns 0 warnings 0 errors before claiming done. Regressing this milestone is a hard fail — fix-forward in same commit, do not ship.

#482 PERF-PDP-LCP: gallery `priority` flag goes on FIRST <Image> ONLY — do NOT add to subsequent slides (defeats the purpose, overloads bandwidth). R2 preconnect already shipped manually in 889862b — do NOT re-add or duplicate the <link rel=preconnect> in layout.tsx.

#483 PERF-COOKIE-LCP: SSR shell approach is preferred over copy-shrink — do NOT remove the cookie banner or hide it from view; GDPR requires it to be visible and dismissible. No script may fire pre-consent (verify with `grep -r 'consent\|gtag\|fbq' src/components/shop/cookie-banner*`).

#484 PERF-VERIFY: GATED — Trace MUST NOT start until #481+#482+#483 all in HEAD AND Vercel deploy of HEAD has propagated (wait 5min after final Bolt commit, verify via `curl -I https://janicka-shop.vercel.app | grep x-vercel-id`). Premature run wastes the audit + provides misleading deltas.
